title: Worry window

steps.title: Name the loop
steps.body: Write the worry in one sentence.

steps.title: Control check
steps.body: How much control do you have right now?

steps.title: Worry window
steps.body: Choose a short time later when you will revisit this.

steps.title: Redirect
steps.body: Pick one activity to return to after parking the worry.

completionPrompt: Parking worry is a practice, not a command to stop thinking.
